name: Platformer Solids (entity solids + swept collision proof)
description: Reuse proof for the 0.7.0 entity-vs-entity solid resolution + swept collision enablers (INDIE-ROADMAP Tier-0 0.3/0.4): a player lands on, is blocked by, bonks, and jumps off solid crate + ledge entities, rides a vertical lift via solid-collide, and a fast faller lands on a thin platform without tunnelling.
